title.ko: 아날로그 컴퓨터 (광학적 아날로그 계산장치 G06E3/00)
title.en: ANALOGUE COMPUTERS (analogue optical computing devices G06E0003000000)

title.ko: 수동식 계산 장치
title.en: Hand-manipulated computing devices

title.ko: 평행 또는 동심원형에 새겨진 스케일의 길이를 더하고, 빼고 또는 비교하는 것에 의하여 계산이 이루어지는 장치
title.en: Devices in which computing is effected by adding, subtracting, or comparing lengths of parallel or concentric graduated scales

title.ko: 그 구조를 특징으로 하는 것(G06G 1/10이 우선)
title.en: characterised by construction (G06G0001100000 takes precedence)
with rectilinear scales, e.g. slide rule
with circular or helical scales
characterised by the graduation
logarithmic graduations, e.g. for multiplication
in which a straight or curved line has to be drawn from given points on one or more input scales to one or more points on a result scale
in which a straight or curved line has to be drawn through related points on one or more families of curves

title.ko: 계산동작이 기계적으로 행하여지는 장치 (G06G1/00이 우선)
title.en: Devices in which the computing operation is performed mechanically (G06G0001000000 takes precedence)
for performing additions or subtractions, e.g. differential gearing
for performing multiplications or divisions, e.g. variable-ratio gearing
for evaluating functions by using cams and cam followers
for integrating or differentiating, e.g. by wheel and disc
for simulating specific processes, systems, or devices

title.ko: 유체압력 소자에 의해 연산 작업이 수행되는 장치
title.en: Devices in which the computing operation is performed by means of fluid-pressure elements

title.ko: 전기 또는 자기량을 변화시켜 연산 작업이 수행되는 장치
title.en: Devices in which the computing operation is performed by varying electric or magnetic quantities

title.ko: 그룹 G06G 7/04 ～ G06G 7/10에 속하지 않는 세부
title.en: Details not covered by groups G06G0007040000-G06G0007100000

title.ko: 입출력 장치
title.en: Input or output devices
Programming arrangements, e.g. plugboard for interconnecting functional units of the computer; Digital programming
Power supply arrangements

title.ko: 연산 작업을 수행하기 위한 장치, 예. 그것에 특히 적합한 증폭기
title.en: Arrangements for performing computing operations, e.g. amplifiers specially adapted therefor
for optimisation, e.g. least square fitting, linear programming, critical path analysis, gradient method

title.ko: 덧셈 또는 뺄셈의 것(백터량에 대해서는 G06G 7/22)
title.en: for addition or subtraction (of vector quantities G06G0007220000)

title.ko: 곱셈 또는 나눗셈을 위한 것
title.en: for multiplication or division
with pulse modulation, e.g. modulation of amplitude, width, frequency, phase, or form
using galvano-magnetic effects, e.g. Hall effect; using similar magnetic effects
using a variable impedance controlled by one of the input signals, variable amplification or transfer function

title.ko: 거듭제곱을 위한 수단을 사용하는 것, 예. 1/4 제곱 승수 (거듭제곱 계산용 G06G7/20)
title.en: using means for evaluating powers, e.g. quarter square multiplier   (for evaluating powers G06G0007200000)

title.ko: 적분 또는 미분을 위한 것(G06G 7/19가 우선)
title.en: for integration or differentiation (G06G0007190000 takes precedence)
using magnetic elements
using capacitive elements
using an operational amplifier comprising a capacitor or a resistor in the feedback loop
using electromechanical elements

title.ko: 곱의 적분을 구하기 위한 것, 예. 푸리에 적분, 라플라스 적분 또는 상관적분; 직교함수를 사용한 함수의 합성 또는 분석을 위한 것
title.en: for forming integrals of products, e.g. Fourier integrals, Laplace integrals or correlation integrals; for analysis or synthesis of functions using orthogonal functions
using electro-acoustic elements

title.ko: 거듭제곱, 근, 다항식, 자승평균치, 표준편차를 위한 것 (G06G7/122, G06G7/28이 우선)
title.en: for evaluating powers, roots, polynomes, mean square values or standard deviation (G06G0007122000, G06G0007280000 take precedence)

title.ko: 삼각관계의 값을 구하기 위한 것; 좌표교환을 위한 것; 백터량을 포함하는 계산을 하기 위한 것 (연립방정식을 사용하는 삼각함수의 계산 G06G7/34)
title.en: for evaluating trigonometric functions; for conversion of co-ordinates; for computations involving vector quantities (trigonometric computations using simultaneous equations G06G0007340000)
for evaluating logarithmic or exponential functions, e.g. hyperbolic functions
for discontinuous functions, e.g. backlash, dead zone, limiting, absolute value, or peak value

title.ko: 임의 함수 생성기 (직교 함수를 사용하는 것, 예. 푸리에 급수 G06G7/19)
title.en: Arbitrary function generators (using orthogonal functions, e.g. Fourier series, G06G0007190000)
for synthesising functions by piecewise approximation

title.ko: 내삽 또는 외삽을 위한 것(G06G 7/122가 우선)
title.en: for interpolation or extrapolation (G06G0007122000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 방정식을 풀기 위한 것
title.en: for solving of equations

title.ko: 연립방정식을 위한 것(G06G 7/122가 우선)
title.en: of simultaneous equations (G06G0007122000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 2차 이상의 단일방정식을 위한 것(G06G7/22, G06G7/24기 우선)
title.en: of single equations of quadratic or higher degree (G06G0007220000, G06G0007240000 take precedence)

title.ko: 미분방정식 또는 적분방정식의 것
title.en: of differential or integral equations

title.ko: 편미분 방정식의 (특정 프로세스, 시스템 또는 장치용 아날로그 컴퓨터, 예. 시뮬레이터 G06G7/48)
title.en: of partial differential equations (analogue computers for specific processes, systems or devices, e.g. simulators, G06G0007480000)
using electrolytic tank
using continuous medium, current-sensitive paper
using discontinuous medium, e.g. resistance network

title.ko: 특정한 프로세스, 시스템 또는 장치를 위한 아날로그 컴퓨터 예, 시뮬에이터
title.en: Analogue computers for specific processes, systems, or devices, e.g. simulators

title.ko: 분배망을 위한 것, 예. 유체 분배망용(G06G 7/62가 우선)
title.en: for distribution networks, e.g. for fluids (G06G0007620000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 경제시스템용의 것; 통계용의 것 (G06G7/122, G06G7/19, G06G7/20이 우선)
title.en: for economic systems; for statistics (G06G0007122000, G06G0007190000, G06G0007200000 take precedence)
for nuclear physics, e.g. nuclear reactors, radioactive fallout

title.ko: 열 흐름의 것 (G06G7/58이 우선)
title.en: for heat flow (G06G0007580000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 유체흐름의 것(G06G 7/50이 우선)
title.en: for fluid flow (G06G0007500000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 화학적 프로세스용의 것(G06G 7/75가 우선)
title.en: for chemical processes (G06G0007750000 takes precedence)
for living beings, e.g. their nervous systems

title.ko: 전기적 시스템 또는 장치를 위한 것
title.en: for electric systems or apparatus

title.ko: 임피던스 회로망, 예. 응답 결정, 극 또는 영점의 결정, 나이퀴스트 도표의 결정을 위한 것
title.en: for impedance networks, e.g. determining response, determining poles or zeros or determining the Nyquist diagram
for power apparatus, e.g. motors, or supply distribution networks
for determining the most economical distribution in power systems
for non-electric machines, e.g. turbine
for control systems
for civil-engineering structures, e.g. beam, strut, girder

title.ko: 탈것을 위한 것, 예. 선박의 허용적재량을 결정하기 위한 것
title.en: for vehicles, e.g. to determine permissible loading of ships

title.ko: 비행 시뮬레이터
title.en: Flight simulators

title.ko: 성분분석을 위한 것, 예. 혼합물 색의 성분분석을 위한 것(G06G 7/122가 우선)
title.en: for component analysis, e.g. of mixtures, of colours (G06G0007122000 takes precedence)
for traffic
for direction-finding, locating, distance or velocity measuring, or navigation systems
for gun-laying; for bomb aiming; for guiding missiles
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
